page_content:
ARAB788 Internship in Arabic (3-6 Credits)

Field and/or professional experience in a public or private institution where Arabic is the language of work.

Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Languages, Literatures, and Cultures department.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

ARAB7839 Independent Study in Arabic (1-3 Credits)

Independent study in Arabic. Taught in Arabic.
